files.detail: Layer 2 orchestration runtime — deriveConditionActions, GuidedActionCard, OrchestrationGuidanceRuntime. 550 lines. Extracted from SoftwareIntelligenceField.jsx

Layer 3 domain cognition only — removed all orchestration (deriveGuidedActions, GuidedActionCard, GuidedActionFlow, ACTION_MODE constants, SQO execution). 958 → 408 lines. Removed sqoBinding/sqoAuthorityWorkspace/fullReport from all view exports
Added import of OrchestrationGuidanceRuntime. Updated RepresentationField to render orchestration alongside all 6 view paths. SW-Intel views no longer receive orchestration props
Added orch-* CSS block (280+ rules) for orchestration runtime. Preserved existing sw-intel-guided-* rules
